diagrams.title: Inner Product Space Structure
diagrams.description: Shows relationship: Vector Space + Inner Product → Inner Product Space, enabling length and angle concepts
diagrams.purpose: Understand how inner product extends vector space capabilities

diagrams.title: Gram-Schmidt Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step orthogonalization: start with basis vectors, for each new vector subtract projections onto all previous orthogonal vectors, then normalize
elements: For k=2 to n: uk = vk - Σ<vk,uj>uj

diagrams.title: Orthogonal Projection Geometry
diagrams.description: Vector v projected onto subspace W: shows perpendicular from v to W giving projection pw, and rejection (v-pw) perpendicular to W
elements: Rejection: v - pw orthogonal to W
diagrams.purpose: Visualize decomposition: any vector = projection + perpendicular

diagrams.title: Operator Classification Diagram
diagrams.description: Hierarchy and relationships: Linear → Normal → (Self-Adjoint / Unitary) showing how special properties relate
diagrams.purpose: Understand different operator types and their properties
